ddls:
CREATE TABLE "land_data" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data is collected */,
  "zone_code" INTEGER /* Zoning code for the land area */,
  "vegetation_count" INTEGER /* Count of vegetation in the area */,
  "area" REAL /* Area size in square units */,
  "min_vegetation" INTEGER /* Minimum vegetation count */,
  "max_vegetation" INTEGER /* Maximum vegetation count */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of vegetation count */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean vegetation count */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of vegetation count */,
  "sum" INTEGER /* Sum of vegetation counts */,
  "variety" INTEGER /* Variety of vegetation types */,
  "majority" INTEGER /* Majority vegetation type */,
  "minority" INTEGER /* Minority vegetation type */,
  "median" INTEGER /* Median vegetation count */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the land area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the land area */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "zoning_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of zoning regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_data_zone_code FOREIGN KEY ("zone_code") REFERENCES zones ("zone_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the state is in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state data */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning code */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning code */,
  "regulations" TEXT /* Regulations associated with the zoning code */,
  "permitted_land_use" TEXT /* Types of land use permitted in the zone */,
  "prohibited_land_use" TEXT /* Types of land use prohibited in the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_types" (
  "vegetation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation type */,
  "vegetation_name" TEXT /* Name of the vegetation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vegetation type */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the vegetation species */,
  "average_height" REAL /* Average height of the vegetation type */,
  "average_canopy_cover" REAL /* Average canopy cover of the vegetation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vegetation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land data object */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device, etc.) used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES land_data ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land data object */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage trends, vegetation health) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report contents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES land_data ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device, etc.) used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land data object */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analytics */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics was performed */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* Input parameters used for the analytics */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model or algorithm used for the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES land_data ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who was invited to collaborate */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or task being collaborated on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., report ready, new data available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the import was performed */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was generated */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Text of the log message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
